summary: Cross-chain address and asset mapping for the Qubit Bridge benchmark. The exploit hinged on the absence of a strong (asset, amount) binding between the Ethereum deposit and the BSC mint side.

ethereum.note: Native sentinel; Qubit's deposit() used address(0) to designate native ETH

user_identity.bsc_address: <attacker EOA on BSC, often same address>
user_identity.note: Bridge passed the recipient unchanged across chains; attacker used the same EVM address on both.
